description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a UnitTest job using the python:3.6 Docker image; its before_script runs wget to add Google signing key, adds the Chrome apt source, installs pip requirements, runs Django makemigrations and migrate, updates apt and installs unzip, google-chrome-stable, xvfb, downloads and unzips chromedriver 2.32, collects static files, and starts the Django development server on port 8000 in the background. The UnitTest script then executes `coverage run --include='lab_*/*' manage.py test` followed by `coverage report -m`, and the job runs on_success. In the deploy stage add a Deployment job using the ruby:2.4 image; its before_script installs the dpl gem and the Heroku CLI via the official install script, then its script runs `dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY`, exports `HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY`, and runs `heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate`. The deployment job sets the environment name to production with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST.
